_generator.by: claude-opus-4-7 (in-session, acting as the LLM layout agent)
_generator.rationale_for_inlining: scripts/layout-vignette.mjs is the runnable, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY-driven version of this step. For this initial vignette the LLM was Claude-in-the-session, so its output is captured here directly as the layout-of-record. Future vignettes will run the script.

inputs.brief: A small reading corner with a comfortable mid-century armchair, a tall brass floor lamp, a small leather footstool, and a stack of three hardcover books on the floor next to the chair.

components.rationale: Anchor at origin, turned ~30° to give the scene depth and let the lamp peek over the back. Scale 1.046 brings the model to ~0.85 m tall.
Behind-right of the chair so the shade sits above shoulder height. Scale 1.353 brings the lamp to ~1.55 m tall, the standard real-world reading-light height.
In front of the chair as a footrest, ~0.85 m forward of the chair centre. Scale 0.578 brings it to ~0.45 m tall, the right ratio against the chair seat.
On the floor to the left of the chair, slightly turned. Scale 0.358 brings the stack to ~0.22 m tall — three books high.

camera.rationale: ~3 m offset, slight elevation, framed to fit chair + lamp + ottoman + books with room to orbit.
